title: rotang rudentum
side_effects: Rotang rudentum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to the excessive release of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can lead to skin irritation and allergic reactions, resulting in redness, itching, and blistering. In severe cases, improper use of rotang rudentum can cause respiratory problems, such as coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath, due to the inhalation of its toxic particles. If ingested in large quantities, rotang rudentum can cause severe organ damage, including liver and kidney failure, and even death.
